base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of grow_shrink_transform — a effect_layer from 1985 super mario bros. alternates Small↔Big silhouette rapidly with color-flicker during invuln window. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame powerup-transition animation — alternates Small↔Big silhouette rapidly with color-flicker during invuln window; 'Grow' on mushroom pickup, 'Shrink' on damage with Big form. Fire variant uses same frames with fire-palette.
